label: Career Training & Certifications
tagline: Short, hands-on, non-credit training that gets you certified and job-ready — in person or live online.
source: CPCC Continuing Education — Information Technology (Live Instructor Sessions)

courses.name: Cybersecurity Analyst
courses.desc: Advance your cybersecurity career with comprehensive training in CompTIA Security+ and CySA+. Learn essential skills in threat detection, incident response, risk management, and security analytics to protect against cyber threats and earn globally recognized certifications.

courses.name: CompTIA Security+ & PenTest+
courses.desc: Prepare for cybersecurity success with our dual CompTIA Security+ and PenTest+ certification training. Gain hands-on experience in IT security, vulnerability assessment, and penetration testing. Learn from experts and earn industry-recognized certifications to advance your career in cybersecurity.

courses.name: CISSP Training
courses.desc: Prepare for the CISSP certification with our comprehensive 8-week training program. Master all eight CISSP domains, gain real-world cybersecurity knowledge, and get ready to pass the ISC2 CISSP exam on your first attempt.

courses.name: CompTIA SecAI+ Training
courses.desc: CompTIA SecAI+ Training prepares cybersecurity and IT professionals to secure AI systems, assess AI-specific risks, defend against AI-enabled attacks, and apply governance and compliance controls. Aligned with the CompTIA SecAI+ (CY0001) certification, this course focuses on practical AI security and enterprise risk management.

courses.name: CompTIA Network+
courses.desc: Advance your IT career with the CompTIA Network+ Certification Training. Gain hands-on skills in network infrastructure, routing, switching, wireless technologies, and security to securely establish, maintain, and troubleshoot modern networks. This vendor-neutral certification is a critical foundation for cybersecurity and IT support roles. Stay ahead with industry-relevant training and prepare for the CompTIA Network+ exam. Enroll today!

courses.name: AWS Cloud Foundations
courses.desc: Enroll in the AWS Cloud Foundations course to build a strong understanding of cloud computing and AWS services. This online course covers AWS infrastructure, security, pricing, and architecture, preparing you for the AWS Certified Cloud Practitioner exam. Gain hands-on experience with interactive labs and expert-led instruction.

courses.name: AWS Cloud Security
courses.desc: Gain essential cloud security knowledge with the AWS Cloud Security Foundations course. Learn AWS security principles, identity and access management, data protection, monitoring, and incident response. Hands-on labs and real-world scenarios prepare you for AWS security certifications and advanced learning.

courses.name: AWS Cloud Architecting
courses.desc: Master AWS cloud architecture with the AWS Academy Cloud Architecting course. Learn to design scalable, secure, and cost-efficient cloud solutions using AWS services. Gain hands-on experience with networking, compute, storage, and automation while preparing for the AWS Certified Solutions Architect – Associate exam.

courses.name: AWS Cloud Operations
courses.desc: Develop essential cloud operations skills with the AWS Academy Cloud Operations course. Learn to deploy, manage, and troubleshoot AWS environments using AWS tools, automation frameworks, and best practices. Gain hands-on experience in security, networking, and monitoring while preparing for the AWS Certified SysOps Administrator – Associate exam.

courses.name: AWS Cloud Developing
courses.desc: Learn to develop, deploy, and secure cloud-based applications with the AWS Academy Cloud Developing course. Gain hands-on experience with AWS SDKs, APIs, serverless architectures, and cloud-native best practices. Prepare for the AWS Certified Developer – Associate certification with real-world labs and guided exercises.

courses.name: Excel Business Analytics
courses.desc: Master Excel for business analytics with comprehensive training in data manipulation, visualization, and advanced modeling techniques. Learn predictive and prescriptive analytics to drive data-driven decisions and gain actionable insights across industries.

courses.name: SQL Business Analytics
courses.desc: Build a strong foundation in relational database design, SQL querying, business intelligence, and advanced analytics. This comprehensive course covers data management, security, visualization, and real-world applications using Tableau or Power BI, preparing you to support data-driven decision-making across industries.

courses.name: Power BI Certification
courses.desc: Master Microsoft Power BI in this fully online course. Learn to prepare data, build models, create dashboards, and share insights. Designed for PL-300 certification exam prep.

courses.name: Python for Data Analytics
courses.desc: Beginning Python Data Analytics is a hands-on course that teaches data analysis using Python, Pandas, NumPy, SQL, and data visualization tools. Learn to clean, analyze, visualize, and manage real-world data from files, databases, APIs, and spreadsheets using industry-standard analytics workflows.

courses.name: Python Programming
courses.desc: Boost your career with our Python Programming course designed for adult learners and career changers. Learn Python coding, data analysis, automation, and software development through hands-on projects and expert instruction. No prior experience needed — start your journey into tech today!

courses.name: Java API Development
courses.desc: Master Java programming and API development in this hands-on course covering core Java, object-oriented principles, RESTful web services, and Spring framework. Ideal for aspiring and professional developers.

courses.name: IT Support Technician
courses.desc: Launch your IT career with this comprehensive IT Support Technician course. Covering CompTIA Tech+ and A+ content, you'll gain hands-on skills in troubleshooting, networking, security, operating systems, and more—preparing you for in-demand IT support roles and certifications.

courses.name: Google Digital Marketing & E-Commerce
courses.desc: Gain essential skills for entry-level roles in digital marketing and e-commerce with the Google Digital Marketing & E-Commerce Certificate. Learn tools like Shopify and Canva, build a professional portfolio, and prepare to drive growth and enhance online presence. Self-paced online course with expert support included.

courses.name: AutoCAD Certificate
courses.desc: Gain job-ready skills in technical drawing, blueprint reading, and 2D CAD drafting with our hands-on AutoCAD Certificate course. Prepare for Autodesk Certified User (ACU) exam in just 10 weeks with in-person training designed for engineers, drafters, and technicians.

courses.name: Workplace Tech Skills
courses.desc: Become a tech-savvy professional with our flexible Digital Literacy & Microsoft Office course. Learn essential computer skills, Office apps, and online communication tools—in the classroom, online, or at your own pace.
